# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

# Define base image, here we are using alpine Linux with Python installed
FROM python:3.7-alpine 

# Working directory in docker container to be set up
WORKDIR /app  

# Copy the contents of local directory to Docker Image at this location(In our case /app)
COPY . /app   

# Specify that the application runs on this port when we start the container
EXPOSE 80    

# Define a command to run our program in the container, here it's python but can be any other program. 
CMD [ "python", "your-processing-script.py" ]
